name: docx2markdown
documentation:
# docx2md

Convert _simple_ `.docx` files to markdown.

## Usage: Python

```
import docx2markdown 

# .docx -> .md
docx2markdown.docx_to_markdown("test-text.docx", "test-text-1.md")

# .md -> .docx
docx2markdown.markdown_to_docx("test-text-1.md", "test-text-2.docx")
```

## Usage: Terminal

```
docx2markdown test-text.docx test-text.md
```
OR:
```
docx2markdown test-text.md test-text.docx
```


## Installation

```
pip install docx2markdown
```

## Contributing

Feedback and contributions are welcome! Just open an issue and let's discuss before you send a pull request. 

## Acknowledgements

We acknowledge the financial support by the Federal Ministry of Education and Research of Germany and by Sächsische Staatsministerium für Wissenschaft, Kultur und Tourismus in the programme Center of Excellence for AI-research „Center for Scalable Data Analytics and Artificial Intelligence Dresden/Leipzig", project identification number: ScaDS.AI

functions.name: docx2markdown._docx_to_markdown.docx_to_markdown
documentation: Convert a .docx file to a Markdown file and a subfolder of images.

functions.name: docx2markdown._docx_to_markdown.extract_r_embed
documentation:
Extract the value of r:embed from the given XML string.

```
param xml_string

The XML content as a string.

return

The value of r:embed or None if not found.
```

functions.name: docx2markdown._docx_to_markdown.save_image
documentation: Save an image to the output folder and return the filename.

functions.name: docx2markdown._docx_to_markdown.get_list_level
documentation: Determine the level of a bullet point or numbered list item.

functions.name: docx2markdown._docx_to_markdown.get_bullet_point_prefix
documentation: Determine the Markdown prefix for a bullet point based on its indentation level.

functions.name: docx2markdown._docx_to_markdown.parse_run
documentation: Go through document objects recursively and return markdown.

functions.name: docx2markdown._markdown_to_docx.markdown_to_docx
documentation: Convert a Markdown file to a .docx file.

functions.name: docx2markdown._markdown_to_docx.add_hyperlink
documentation:
Add a hyperlink to a paragraph in a Word document.

```
param paragraph

The paragraph to which the hyperlink will be added.

param url

The URL for the hyperlink.

param text

The display text for the hyperlink.

return

None
```

functions.name: docx2markdown._markdown_to_docx.process_line_with_links
documentation:
Parse a line for hyperlinks and regular text, adding them to the document.

```
param doc

The Word document object.

param line

The Markdown line to parse.

return

None
```

functions.name: docx2markdown._markdown_to_docx.add_table
documentation: Add a Markdown-style table to the document.

functions.name: docx2markdown._markdown_to_docx.add_bullet_point
documentation: Add a bullet point with the appropriate indentation.

functions.name: docx2markdown._markdown_to_docx.parse_and_add_text_with_formatting
documentation:
Parse a line for bold (**text**) and italic (*text*) formatting
and add it to the document.
